title: solanum hypomalacum
intro: Solanum hypomalacum, also known as the black nightshade or deadly nightshade, is a perennial plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Solanaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Solanum hypomalacum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
